calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Bob Balian, CSR #5220.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners, a New York Partnership.
No appearnce by defendant Duncan Fraser, a/k/a Duncan Fraser, III.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 20, 2009.
Declaration of Steve Ballman in Lieu of Live Testimony (CCP Section 98) was filed on November 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Unifund CCR Partners, a New York Partnership, and against defendant Duncan Fraser, a/k/a Duncal franser, III as follows:

Principal - $6,113.05.
Interest - $1,500.63.
Attorney's Fees - $950.00.
Costs - $395.00.00.

Total - $8,958.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
